overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding game showing a character in dark robes walking through a gothic castle corridor, ascending a grand staircase, and entering a vast candlelit dining hall filled with students. The environment features detailed stone architecture, floating candles, and warm lighting streaming through stained glass windows.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor, passing framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: tall arched corridor with stone walls and gothic columns
oval and rectangular portraits in ornate frames hanging on the stone walls
ornate stone balustrade with carved floral details
tall gothic windows letting in soft natural light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed stone corridor with gothic architecture. Framed portraits hang on the right wall while tall windows on the left provide diffused natural light. The space is empty of other people, creating a quiet, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with statue landing

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the large boar statue at the landing

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps with gothic railings on both sides
large stone statue of a boar positioned at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase within the enclosed castle interior. A large stone boar statue waits at the top landing. The portraits and windows from the lower corridor fall behind as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle entrance hall with large wooden doors

events.description: approaching the massive wooden doors that lead to the Great Hall

agents.ego_description: walking across the entrance hall toward the large wooden doors

notable_agents.action: distant figures standing near the doors ahead

entered.detail: massive double doors with iron hinges and intricate carvings
suits of medieval armor standing against the stone walls
vertical hanging banner with yellow and black stripes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a larger entrance hall with a high vaulted ceiling, approaching massive wooden doors. Suits of armor line the left wall and a house banner hangs prominently. The lighting is dimmer here, creating anticipation before the doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles

events.description: doors open revealing the brightly lit Great Hall with sunlight streaming through stained glass
entering the Great Hall from the dark entrance vestibule

agents.ego_description: pushing open the large doors and stepping into the vast candlelit Great Hall filled with students

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at long tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: hundreds of candles floating in mid-air throughout the hall
massive gothic windows with intricate stained glass designs at the far end
long wooden tables set with plates, food, and green table runners
large ornate fireplace with carved stone mantelpiece

segments.scene_description: The character opens the massive doors, revealing a dramatic lighting change as the bright Great Hall comes into view. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space above long dining tables filled with students. Sunlight streams through enormous stained glass windows at the far end, while a large fireplace is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: Great Hall interior with dining students

agents.ego_description: walking down the central aisle between the dining tables, passing students on both sides

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes eating and talking at the tables

entered.detail: raised platform with high table at the front of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the vast Great Hall, moving deeper into the space. The floating candles now appear overhead, and the long dining tables pass by on the right filled with students. The character approaches the front of the hall where the professors' table sits on a raised platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, enclosed gothic corridor into the expansive, candlelit grandeur of a bustling dining hall. It begins by following a character through a narrow stone hallway lined with portraits and diffused light, before ascending a grand staircase toward a stone boar statue. As the character reaches the top, the scene shifts into a dimmer entrance hall where suits of armor and house banners line the path toward massive wooden doors. The environment then opens dramatically as the doors swing wide, transitioning from the shadows into a bright, vaulted space illuminated by hundreds of floating candles and sunlight streaming through stained glass. Finally, the camera glides deeper into the Great Hall, passing long tables filled with students before approaching the professors' table on a raised platform.
